PWHL Play-by-play

Source: R/pwhl_pbp.R
pwhl_pbp.Rd

PWHL Play-by-play

Usage

pwhl_pbp(game_id)

Arguments

game_id

Game ID that you want play-by-play for

Value

A data frame with play-by-play event data including columns: game_id, event, team_id, period_of_game, time_of_period, player_id, player_name_first, player_name_last, player_position, x_coord, y_coord, and additional event-specific columns (shot_quality, goal, penalty_length, home_win, etc.). Coordinate columns are provided in multiple projections.

Examples

# \donttest{
try(pwhl_pbp(game_id = 27))
#>     game_id   event team_id period_of_game time_of_period player_id
#> 1        27 faceoff      NA              1           0:00        15
#> 2        27 faceoff      NA              1           0:31        15
